column2: Revised ACP target in Agri Segment for 2025-26 to be allotted to all banks
column4: Revised target has since been allotted to all banks by the LDMs in the portal.

column2: All banks to maintain Data Uni- formity to ensure accuracy, reli- ability and meaningful analysis. Banks to meticulously ensure usage of Scale of Finance while financing KCC.
column4: Banks have been instructed to ensure ac- curacy and to the extent possible SLBC is verifying the data to detect apparent anom- alies. Banks are using SOF for KCC loans and no violation of the same is reported to SLBC till date.

column2: ATM to be installed in Rerapara Block, South Garo Hills.
column4: Banks having branches in the block have been instructed to explore the possibility of installing the ATM.

column2: Banks to finance the shortfall to beneficiaries of PMAY (G) as the amount under the scheme is not sufficient to fund the cost of house construction.
column4: Banks have been instructed to finance the gap to beneficiaries whenever they ap- proach them.

column2: Banks to explore financing of Farmers Producers Organisation through Cash Credit to promote agricultural production
column4: Banks have been instructed to finance via- ble FPOs in their area of operations.

column2: Banks to educate Headmen/Sec- retary of villages regarding banks schemes.
column4: Banks have been instructed to take initia- tive to educate the Headmen/Secretary of villages on ongoing basis.
